title: Spider Drops OP Loot
description: Turn spiders into an overpowered loot source for intense and rewarding survival combat.
body:
The Spider is OP datapack upgrades spiders in Minecraft to become powerful and highly rewarding enemies. When defeated, spiders can drop overpowered items, enchanted gear, or rare resources, making nighttime and cave exploration much more exciting.

This pack adds a fun risk-and-reward twist to survival gameplay while keeping vanilla mechanics mostly intact.

Features

🕷 Spiders drop OP items and rare loot

💎 Enchanted tools, weapons, and armor included

🌙 Makes night and cave combat more rewarding

⚡ Faster survival progression

🎮 Compatible with vanilla gameplay

🌍 Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
